title: Financial Assistance & Grants
excerpt: All of our programs may be eligible for the “One Happy Camper” grant, “PJ Goes to Camp” grant, or Financial Assistance. For any information regarding Financial Assistance, you are welcome to pursue a confidential conversation with Barbara Vahaba, Financial Assistance Coordinator, at 678.812.4142. ALL FAMILIES The One Happy Camper grant application is open for summer […]
contentHtml:
All of our programs may be eligible for the “One Happy Camper” grant, “PJ Goes to Camp” grant, or Financial Assistance. For any information regarding Financial Assistance, you are welcome to pursue a confidential conversation with Barbara Vahaba, Financial Assistance Coordinator, at 678.812.4142.

ALL FAMILIES

The One Happy Camper grant application is open for summer 2026. Check their website to see if you qualify for an incentive grant and submit an application when it is available. Note: your child must be registered for camp before applying for this grant.

Visit PJ Library to see if you qualify for the PJ Goes to Camp grant and get a referral code to apply.

ATLANTA AREA FAMILIES

Camp Barney Medintz is a proud partner of the Jewish Federation of Greater Atlanta’s Jewish Overnight Camp Initiative. The initiative is dedicated to sending more children from Atlanta to Jewish overnight camp and has financial resources available to help make camp affordable. For more information on One Happy Camper or Needs-Based Financial Assistance, please email Barbara Vahaba or call her at 678.812.4142.

One Happy Camper Grants for First time campers from Atlanta:

  • $1,500 grant if enrolled for 19+ consecutive days
  • $1,000 grant if enrolled for at least 12 consecutive days

One Happy Camper Grants for Second year campers from Atlanta ($175,000 income cap):

  • $750 grant if enrolled for 19+ consecutive days
  • $500 grant if enrolled for at least 12 consecutive days

Members of the MJCCA can apply for financial assistance through the Marcus JCC of Atlanta. Applications will be accepted after September 8. Click here for details and frequently asked questions.

FAMILIES OUTSIDE OF METRO ATLANTA

Please click here for possible options for resources in your area.
